'''K'vin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] individual who was the disembodied leader of the [[Most Perfect Order of K'vin]], a [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]-based cult he claimed was a sect of the [[B'omarr Order/Legends|B'omarr Order]].

==Biography==
K'vin was present when [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Eron Stonefield]] ventured into the Order's [[B'omarr outpost|citadel]] on the hunt for [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and requested that she shoot the vat his brain was held in. The bounty hunter complied, but instead of reaching total enlightenment, K'vin's brain soon died as a result of being exposed outside of the nutrient filled jar.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]]'' {{1st}}
